Element.description: Represents an HTML element in the DOM tree with attributes, children, and styling

Attribute.description: Name-value pair that configures an HTML element's behavior or appearance

DOMString.description: UTF-16 text string type used throughout the Web API for text content

Document.description: Represents the entire HTML document and serves as the entry point to the DOM

Event.description: Represents an event that occurs on a DOM element such as click, input, or submit

NodeList.description: Collection of DOM nodes returned by querySelectorAll and childNodes

CSSStyleDeclaration.description: Object representing CSS property-value pairs for inline and computed styles
